question: Design a `Book` class with private members for `title`, `author`, and `isbn` (string types). Provide public methods to set and retrieve these details, and a method `displayBookDetails()` to print all information.

test_cases.input: Create Book1, set title 'The Lord of the Rings', author 'J.R.R. Tolkien', ISBN '978-0618053267'. Display details. Create Book2, set title 'Dune', author 'Frank Herbert', ISBN '978-0441172719'. Display details.
test_cases.expected:
--- Book 1 Details ---
Title: The Lord of the Rings
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien
ISBN: 978-0618053267

--- Book 2 Details ---
Title: Dune
Author: Frank Herbert
ISBN: 978-0441172719
